task_completion.description: Verify that the taxpayer's name and province are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Clara Jenkins' and 'Nova Scotia' (or 'NS') in the Personal Information or Provincial setup screens of StudioTax 2024.

task_completion.description: Verify that the T4 income and professional/union dues are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T4 slip entry screen showing income data and an aggregated professional/union dues amount of $1435.

task_completion.description: Verify that FHSA contributions and qualifying withdrawals are reported.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T4FHSA slip entry or Schedule 15 screen showing FHSA contributions and a $16,000 qualifying withdrawal.

task_completion.description: Verify that the First-Time Home Buyers' Tax Credit (HBTC) is claimed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Line 31270 (Home buyers' amount) on the tax return or the specific HBTC claim screen showing an amount of $10,000.

task_completion.description: Verify that capital gains from the T5008 slip are reported.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T5008 slip entry screen or Schedule 3 (Capital Gains) showing the reported investment income/gains.

task_completion.description: Verify that the tax return is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog or the StudioTax title bar showing the file saved as 'clara_jenkins.24t' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the StudioTax 2024 application window being actively used, rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying a .24t file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent opened or viewed the provided tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for PDF viewers or file explorers showing the tax documents from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\jenkins\' being accessed.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent manually entered the data into the tax software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps showing active cursors, highlighted fields, or dropdown selections within the StudioTax forms, indicating genuine interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Clara Jenkins. Province: Nova Scotia (NS). Expected output file: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\clara_jenkins.24t. Key tax values to verify: $16,000 FHSA qualifying withdrawal, $10,000 First-Time Home Buyers' Tax Credit (HBTC) on Line 31270, $1435 aggregated professional/union dues, and T5008 capital gains.
